format: ALEX/JORDAN dialogue, plain text, no stage directions
notes: Episode 3 covers prior runs (one — 2022 D7 Dem primary 35.76% / general 66.98% vs Maldonado), Council votes by topic (immigration: Trust Act yes + sponsored ICE-Out definitional amendment + co-introducer on Uplifting Victims Act; public safety: 32-23 documented evolution under Silver Spring Justice Coalition + NAACP pressure; reproductive health: co-introducer on Albornoz employer-inquiry ban; budget: yes on FY26 unanimous), endorsements (Feb 17 2026 'avalanche' reported, full ledger pending). Listener-flagged Wootton question handled by-name with March 26 2026 BoE 7-1 vote, April 27 parents appeal to State BoE, and the explicit on-air statement that Luedtke has no public position in the record. Same handling for the new MCPS grading regulation. Cross-references to Friedson and Kramer dossiers without re-litigating them.
